overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by flashlight. The scene features a dirt path through dense vegetation with a large rock formation visible early in the clip. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine, depicting a solitary nighttime hike through natural woodland.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, viewed from a first-person perspective with flashlight illumination. A large light-colored rock formation is visible on the right side while the camera walks forward along the narrow dirt path, surrounded by dense tall grass and vegetation on both sides.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward along the forest trail after passing the large rock. segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued forward movement along the forest trail. The vegetation on both sides appears to move past as the camera advances, with the dense tree line remaining a constant dark boundary ahead. The flashlight continues to illuminate the path through the otherwise pitch-black woodland environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark forest trail that maintains a sense of solitary isolation through a dense woodland. It begins with the camera advancing along a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight illuminates a large light-colored rock formation on the right amidst tall grass and thick vegetation. As the camera passes the rock, the movement continues forward, keeping the flashlight focused on the dirt ground while the distant tree line looms against the pitch-black night sky. The scene then persists in its steady forward progression, with the surrounding greenery blurring past as the path leads deeper into the woods. Finally, the camera pushes further into the darkness, with the dense tree line remaining a constant, imposing boundary ahead.
